data.change_summary: Fixed three issues: (1) first retry no longer waits 5s unnecessarily — backoff now uses cursor.attempt-1 so attempt 1 gets zero delay, (2) map_invoke_error now preserves BackendUnavailable errors (including terminal BinaryNotFound classification) instead of converting them to InvocationFailed{TransportFailure}, (3) OpenRouter invoke path rejects blank OPENROUTER_API_KEY with terminal BinaryNotFound classification matching check_availability behavior.
outstanding_risks: BackendUnavailable errors passing through map_invoke_error will now surface with their original error variant to the engine retry loop; the engine's failure_class() extraction already handles BackendUnavailable correctly, but any consumer matching only on InvocationFailed may need updating
The cursor.attempt - 1 subtraction is safe because StageCursor::new rejects attempt=0, so cursor.attempt is always >= 1 at this point

steps.description: Changed engine.rs backoff call from backoff_for_attempt(cursor.attempt) to backoff_for_attempt(cursor.attempt - 1) so first retry (attempt=1) produces backoff_for_attempt(0)=ZERO, and backoff ramps on repeated failures

Added BackendUnavailable match arm to map_invoke_error in service.rs so invoke-time BackendUnavailable errors (e.g. missing API key with failure_class: Some(BinaryNotFound)) pass through unchanged instead of being wrapped as InvocationFailed{TransportFailure}

Changed process_backend.rs OpenRouter command builder to check for both missing and empty OPENROUTER_API_KEY using .ok().filter(|k| !k.is_empty()), returning InvocationFailed with FailureClass::BinaryNotFound (terminal) consistent with check_availability and openrouter_backend.rs
Renamed test invoke_openrouter_without_api_key_returns_transport_failure to invoke_openrouter_without_api_key_returns_terminal_failure, updated assertion to verify FailureClass::BinaryNotFound
Added new test invoke_openrouter_with_blank_api_key_returns_terminal_failure verifying empty string OPENROUTER_API_KEY also returns terminal BinaryNotFound
Verified all 679 tests pass, cargo clippy clean, cargo fmt --check clean

validation_evidence: cargo clippy: no warnings or errors
Test invoke_openrouter_without_api_key_returns_terminal_failure verifies missing key returns BinaryNotFound
Test invoke_openrouter_with_blank_api_key_returns_terminal_failure verifies empty key returns BinaryNotFound
Existing backoff_for_attempt(0) test from CR9 confirms ZERO is returned for the first-retry case
